mapper.select: SELECT rr.id, rr.rating_template_id, rr.rating_name, rr.rating_code, rr.rating_description, rr.rating_basis, rr.category_ids, rr.score_type, rr.condition_type, rr.icon, rr.color, rr.reward_points, rr.reward_description, rr.sort_order, rr.is_enabled, COUNT(rl.id) as level_count FROM rating_rules rr LEFT JOIN rating_levels rl ON rr.id = rl.rating_rule_id AND rl.deleted = 0 WHERE rr.deleted = 0 AND rr.rating_template_id = #{ratingTemplateId} GROUP BY rr.id ORDER BY rr.sort_order ASC, rr.created_at DESC
SELECT rr.*, rt.template_name as rating_template_name FROM rating_rules rr LEFT JOIN rating_templates rt ON rr.rating_template_id = rt.id AND rt.deleted = 0 WHERE rr.deleted = 0 AND rr.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM rating_rules WHERE deleted = 0 AND rating_code = #{ratingCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rating_rules ( id, rating_template_id, rating_name, rating_code, rating_description, rating_basis, category_ids, score_type, condition_type, icon, color, reward_points, reward_description, sort_order, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.ratingTemplateId}, #{item.ratingName}, #{item.ratingCode}, #{item.ratingDescription}, #{item.ratingBasis}, #{item.categoryIds}, #{item.scoreType}, #{item.conditionType}, #{item.icon}, #{item.color}, #{item.rewardPoints}, #{item.rewardDescription}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isEnabled}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rating_rules SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rating_template_id = #{ratingTemplateId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rating_rules WHERE rating_template_id = #{ratingTemplateId} AND deleted = 0
